zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Skelton於1331年出生在英國波藍德阿馬維艾特時，他的父親John de Skelton53歲，母親Mrs. John de Skelton50歲。他於大約1350年與Margaret Dyneley在英國波藍德格亞特 奧爾頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1365年8月在英國波藍德格亞特 奧爾頓享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Skelton于1331年出生在英国波藍德阿馬維艾特时，他的父亲John de Skelton53岁，母亲Mrs. John de Skelton50岁。他于大约1350年与Margaret Dyneley在英国波藍德格亞特 奧爾頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1365年8月在英国波藍德格亞特 奧爾頓享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Skelton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name mainly from Skelton in Cumberland, or any of various places called Skelton in Yorkshire, North Yorkshire, and East Yorkshire. The placenames probably all derive from Old English scelf ‘rock, ledge, shelf’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, with initial Sk-, instead of Sh-, due to Scandinavian influence. However, in some cases, the first element may be a lost river name, from Old Norse skjallr ‘resounding’; compare Skelding . This English surname has been established in Queen's County [Laois], Ireland, since the 16th century.

variants.name: Skelding
meanings: English: habitational name from Skelding (Yorkshire). The place takes its name from the river Skell, itself from Old Norse skjallr ‘resounding’, + Old English denu ‘valley’. In addition, the name may come from Skeldon (Ayrshire), although there is a lack of evidence for a historic presence in this part of Scotland.

variants.name: Skilton
meanings: English (Surrey): probably a variant of Skelton , though in some cases the name may be a variant of Shilton, a habitational name from Shilton (Warwickshire, Oxfordshire) or Earl Shilton (Leicestershire), from Old English scelf, scylf ‘rock, ledge, shelf’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Skelton was born in 1331, in Armathwaite, Cumberland, England, his father, John de Skelton, was 53 and his mother, Mrs. John de Skelton, was 50. He married Margaret Dyneley about 1350, in Great Orton, Cumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in August 1365, in Great Orton, Cumberland, England, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Skelton est né en 1331, à Armathwaite, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, John de Skelton, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Mrs. John de Skelton, avait 50 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Dyneley environ 1350, à Great Orton, Cumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en août 1365, à Great Orton, Cumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Skelton 1331 in Armathwaite, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Skelton 53 und seine Mutter Mrs. John de Skelton 50. Er hat um 1350 in Great Orton, Cumberland, England Margaret Dyneley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb im August 1365 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Great Orton, Cumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Skelton è nato il nel 1331 nel Armathwaite, Cumberland, England, il suo padre, John de Skelton, aveva 53 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. John de Skelton, aveva 50 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Dyneley circa 1350, nel Great Orton, Cumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel agosto 1365, nel Great Orton, Cumberland, England, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Skeltonが1331年にイギリスクウンバーランドアルマスワイトで生まれた時，父John de Skeltonは53歳，母Mrs. John de Skeltonは50歳であった。約1350年にイギリスクウンバーランドグレアト オルトンでMargaret Dyneleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1365年8月にイギリスクウンバーランドグレアト オルトンで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Skelton(이)가 1331년 영국 c벌랜드 아마스웨이트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Skelton(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. John de Skelton(은)는 50세였다. 그는 대략 1350년 영국 c벌랜드 그리트 오턴에서 Margaret Dyneley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1365년 8월 영국 c벌랜드 그리트 오턴에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Skelton nasceu em 1331, em Armathwaite, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Skelton, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. John de Skelton, tinha 50 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Dyneley aproximadamente 1350, em Great Orton, Cumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em agosto de 1365, em Great Orton, Cumberland, Inglaterra, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Skelton родился в 1331 г. в местности арматвеит, кумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Skelton было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. John de Skelton, 50. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Dyneley около 1350 г. в местности грит ортон, кумбирланд, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер август 1365 г. в местности грит ортон, кумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Skelton nació en 1331, en Armathwaite, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Skelton, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Mrs. John de Skelton, tenía 50 años. Se casó con Margaret Dyneley aproximadamente 1350, en Great Orton, Cumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en agosto de 1365, en Great Orton, Cumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 34 años.
